result: Consolidated 3 memories into a single synthesis.

structured_output.title: JSON Schema oneOf as anti-lazy-skip lever
structured_output.content: When using LLM token-decode-constrained structured output, a top-level oneOf covering both real-output and skip shapes prevents the model from fabricating output for clusters that lack a meaningful answer. Pair the schema with prompt-engineering language that raises the skip cost (state specifically what prevents synthesis), and add a minLength constraint on the skip-shape reason field so lazy skip-with-empty-reason is structurally rejected. The schema cannot prevent semantic laziness alone; the prompt and reason length constraint act as cost amplifiers.
